faq_items.question: Is your retreat center wheelchair accessible?
faq_items.answer: Yes. Our main temple, dining hall, and most guest rooms are wheelchair accessible. We have step-free access to common areas, ramps at building entrances, and at least two fully accessible ground-floor rooms with roll-in showers. If you use a wheelchair or mobility aid, please let us know on your booking form so we can reserve an appropriate room and parking spot.

faq_items.question: Can you accommodate special dietary needs such as vegan, gluten-free, or dairy-free?
faq_items.answer: Yes. Our kitchen prepares mostly plant-based meals and we regularly accommodate vegan, gluten-free, and dairy-free diets. When you register for a retreat, you can indicate your dietary needs on the booking form. For severe allergies, please contact us at least 7 days before arrival so our team can confirm options and discuss any limitations.

faq_items.question: Are the paths around the retreat grounds suitable for guests with limited mobility?
faq_items.answer: The central courtyard, main buildings, and several meditation gardens are connected by wide, mostly level stone paths suitable for wheelchairs and mobility aids. Some forest trails are uneven and not recommended for guests with limited mobility. Our staff are happy to suggest accessible walking routes when you arrive.

faq_items.question: Do I need prior meditation experience to attend a retreat?
faq_items.answer: No. Many of our retreats are suitable for complete beginners. Each event listing clearly notes the recommended experience level. Our teachers offer modifications and extra guidance if you are new to meditation or spiritual practice.

faq_items.question: Do online courses include live Q&A sessions with teachers?
faq_items.answer: Many of our online live and hybrid courses include regular live Q&A calls with the lead teacher. The course page will state "Includes live Q&A sessions" if this is included. Self-paced courses may provide written Q&A via our community forum instead.

faq_items.question: What is your cancellation and refund policy for retreats?
faq_items.answer: For most retreats, deposits are non-refundable but transferable to another date if you cancel at least 30 days before arrival. The remaining balance is refundable up to 21 days before the retreat. Within 21 days, we cannot guarantee a refund but may offer partial credit at our discretion.

faq_items.question: How long do I have access to online course materials?
faq_items.answer: Unless otherwise stated, you will have at least 12 months of access to all online course materials, including replays and downloads. Some programs offer lifetime access; this will be clearly indicated on the course page.

faq_items.question: Do you ship shop items internationally?
faq_items.answer: Yes, we ship most shop items worldwide. Shipping rates and delivery times are calculated at checkout based on your location and the items in your cart. Certain fragile items such as large crystals may have restricted destinations.

faq_items.question: Are community events really free to attend?
faq_items.answer: Yes. Community circles listed as free on our Events calendar do not require payment, though advance registration is still required to reserve your spot. Optional donations can be made on-site or online.

faq_items.question: How do I contact you about specific accessibility or dietary questions?
faq_items.answer: If your accessibility or dietary needs are not covered in the FAQ, please use the contact form and choose the topic "Accessibility & Dietary Needs". Include details about wheelchair use, mobility aids, food allergies, or other requirements so our team can respond with tailored information.
